atlas_doc_format.value:
{"type":"doc","version":1,"content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Simulator Startup"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The reposix simulator runs as a local HTTP service on port 7777. It uses an in-process axum server backed by a bundled SQLite database. No external dependencies are required beyond a Rust toolchain."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Start the simulator before mounting the FUSE filesystem or running integration tests. The simulator initialises the SQLite schema on first boot; subsequent starts are idempotent."}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"bash"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"# Start the simulator
cargo run -p reposix-sim

# Verify it is accepting connections
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:7777/api/v1/issues | jq length"}]}]}

version.message: Add SSRF finding from red-team report

atlas_doc_format.value: {"type":"doc","version":1,"content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Q2 2026 Security Review"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"This review covers the lethal-trifecta analysis for the reposix FUSE+git-remote architecture. Findings are categorised by STRIDE category and mapped to the mitigations in CLAUDE.md."}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"SG-01: Outbound HTTP allowlist defaults to 127.0.0.1 only. Non-default origins require explicit REPOSIX_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"SG-03: Server-controlled frontmatter fields (id, created_at, version) are stripped on the inbound write path before serialisation."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"SG-05: Credential pre-push hook rejects commits that add files matching .env or *_TOKEN patterns."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"SSRF (T-11-C-03): redact_url() applied to all error paths in confluence backend. URL never leaked in log output."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Next review scheduled for 2026-Q3. Open item: macOS FUSE matrix blocked on self-hosted runner (HARD-04 partial)."}]}]}

{"type":"doc","version":1,"content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Getting Started"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Welcome to the reposix onboarding guide. reposix exposes remote issue trackers as a POSIX directory tree, allowing agents and humans alike to use cat, grep, sed, and git on live issue data without learning JSON schemas or REST endpoint signatures."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Before you begin, ensure your development environment meets the prerequisites listed in the table below. The Rust toolchain version is pinned in rust-toolchain.toml at the repository root; cargo will download and activate the correct version automatically on first build."}]},{"type":"table","attrs":{"isNumberColumnEnabled":false,"layout":"default"},"content":[{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableHeader","attrs":{},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prerequisite","marks":[{"type":"strong"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableHeader","attrs":{},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Minimum Version","marks":[{"type":"strong"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableHeader","attrs":{},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Notes","marks":[{"type":"strong"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Rust toolchain"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"1.82 (stable)"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Managed by rust-toolchain.toml"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Clone the repository and run cargo check --workspace to verify the toolchain is correctly installed. The first build downloads all dependencies; subsequent builds are incremental."}]}]}
